title: Translucent Low Fire
description: Low fire that is see-through! Doesn't affect the block
body:
This is a texture pack that adds low fire — but it's translucent (semi see-through)!\
This makes it a lot easier to concentrate when you are playing survival, PvP, etc. and you are one fire!\
It also doesn't change the look of blocks because otherwise it would look weird.\
![Translucent Low Fire](https://i.postimg.cc/fypH09hS/2025-03-08-09-11-44.png)

**Why is this good for Minecraft?**\
It not only reduces the amount of fire shown on screen, which usually takes up loads of space and makes it difficult to see, it also makes the visible fire on screen see-through so you can have an even better vision!

Enjoy!
